title: Verify password history prevents reuse of last 5 passwords
description: Test that users cannot reuse any of their 5 most recent passwords
preconditions: User has changed password multiple times

steps.description: 1. Navigate to password change (if available) or reset flow
2. Attempt to set a password that was used in last 5 passwords

expected_result: Error message indicates password was used previously; password change is blocked
